zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud la Zouche於大約1288年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾阿什比 德 拉 祖時，她的父親Sir Alan la Zouche22歲，母親Eleanor de Seagrave19歲。她於大約1308年與Robert de Holand III在英國英格蘭哈普爾維古姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她於1327年登記服兵役。她去世於1349年5月31日在英國諾薩普頓史爾布拉可利享年62歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾布拉可利聖 比特也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud la Zouche于大约1288年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾阿什比 德 拉 祖时，她的父亲Sir Alan la Zouche22岁，母亲Eleanor de Seagrave19岁。她于大约1308年与Robert de Holand III在英国英格兰哈普爾維古姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她于1327年登记服兵役。她去世于1349年5月31日在英国諾薩普頓史爾布拉可利享年62岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾布拉可利聖 比特也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Zouche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Zaucha
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Andrzej, Casimir, Franciszek, Kazimierz, Krzysztof, Mieczyslaw, Rafal, Wojciech.
Polish: descriptive nickname from za uchem ‘behind the ear’, denoting someone who had something behind one of his ears. Compare Zoucha .

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud la Zouche was born about 1288, in Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, England, her father, Sir Alan la Zouche, was 22 and her mother, Eleanor de Seagrave, was 19. She married Robert de Holand III about 1308, in Winchester, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She registered for military service in 1327. She died on 31 May 1349, in Brackley, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in St Peter's Church, Brackley, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud la Zouche est née environ 1288, à Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Alan la Zouche, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Eleanor de Seagrave, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Holand III environ 1308, à Winchester, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1327. Elle est décédée le 31 mai 1349, à Brackley, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à St Peter's Church, Brackley, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud la Zouche um 1288 in Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Alan la Zouche 22 und ihre Mutter Eleanor de Seagrave 19. Sie hat um 1308 in Winchester, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom Robert de Holand III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie hat sich 1327 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Sie starb am 31. Mai 1349 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Brackley, Northamptonshire, England und wurde in St Peter's Church, Brackley, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud la Zouche è nata il circa 1288 nel Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, England, sua padre, Sir Alan la Zouche, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Eleanor de Seagrave, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Holand III circa 1308, nel Winchester, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Lei arruolato nell'esercito nel 1327. Morì il 31 maggio 1349, nel Brackley, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a St Peter's Church, Brackley, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud la Zoucheが約1288年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアアシュビー ド ラ ゾウチで生まれた時，父Sir Alan la Zoucheは22歳，母Eleanor de Seagraveは19歳であった。約1308年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアウィンチェスターでRobert de Holand IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1327年に兵役登録をした。彼女は1349年5月31日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブラックリーで62歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブラックリースト ペテル'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud la Zouche(이)가 대략 1288년 영국 레이스스터실르 애스h비 데 라 즈우치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Alan la Zouche(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor de Seagrave(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1308년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 윈체스터에서 Robert de Holand III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1327년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그녀는 1349년 5월 31일 영국 노르섬프토실르 브라클리에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 브라클리 스트 피터'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.Rockingham Castle, Ashby, Leicestershire: Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Inglaterra
pt.St. Peter's Church, Brackley, Northampto: St Peter's Church, Brackley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud la Zouche nasceu aproximadamente 1288, em Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Alan la Zouche, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor de Seagrave, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Holand III aproximadamente 1308, em Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela alistou-se no serviço militar em 1327. Ela faleceu em 31 de maio de 1349, em Brackley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em St Peter's Church, Brackley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Rockingham Castle, Ashby, Leicestershire: ашби де ла зоуч, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: ашби де ла зоуч, лисестиршир, Англия
ru.St. Peter's Church, Brackley, Northampto: ст питир'с чурч, браккли, нортамптоншир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud la Zouche родилась около 1288 г. в местности ашби де ла зоуч, лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Alan la Zouche было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor de Seagrave, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Holand III около 1308 г. в местности винчестир, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. В 1327 году она поступила на военную службу. Она умерла 31 мая 1349 г. в местности браккли, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности ст питир'с чурч, браккли, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.St. Peter's Church, Brackley, Northampto: St Peter's Church, Brackley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maud la Zouche nació aproximadamente 1288, en Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Alan la Zouche, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Eleanor de Seagrave, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Robert de Holand III aproximadamente 1308, en Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1327. Murió el 31 de mayo de 1349, en Brackley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en St Peter's Church, Brackley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
